options.a: A clearway is an area of land or water beyond the runway that must be under the control of the airport authority.
options.b: A clearway extends from the runway end with a 1.5% upward slope through which no obstacle may protrude.
options.c: A clearway must be able to support the weight of an aircraft without causing structural damage.
options.d: The minimum clearway width is 90 m either side of the extended centreline.
